documentation:
If Flow Indicator is enabled on unit, set parm hasFlowIndicator to 1
If Leakage Detector is enabled on unit, set parm hasLeakDetector to 1
If Fan on unit is Zhiel Abegg, set parm IsZhielFan to 1
If Fan on unit is MultiWing and Fan Status is enabled, set parm IsMultiWingFan to 1
If Remote Start/Stop is configured for unit, set param hasRemoteStartStop to 1
If Pump Alarm is configured for unit, set param hasPumpAlarm to 1
If Humidistat is configured for unit, set parm hasHumidiStat to 1
fanAlarmAltReg - Fan_Alarm is using register 10050 by default, however, there is an optional/alternate register of 10021 that can be used
name: Munters_HM3_PlantPax_Modbus_v3
